<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"List project user bindings"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/meshobjects/meshprojectbindings/userbindings"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



List all meshProjectUserBindings for a specific project with optional filtering and pagination

**Authentication:** This endpoint supports API Key authentication.

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
  children={"Request"}
>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"name":"workspaceIdentifier","in":"query","description":"The identifier of the workspace the project with the bindings belongs to.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"projectIdentifier","in":"query","description":"The project identifier of the project that contains the requested bindings.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}},{"name":"Accept","in":"header","description":"This endpoint of meshObject API is individually <<versioning,versioned>>. Use `application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshprojectuserbinding.v3.hal+json` for this version of the endpoint.","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"},"example":"application/vnd.meshcloud.api.meshprojectuserbinding.v3.hal+json"}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={undefined}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

  id={undefined}
  label={undefined}

only contains the self link and <<paging,pagination>> identifier of the workspace which contains the project."}}},"subject":{"required":["name"],"type":"object","properties":{"name":{"type":"string","description":"The username of the referenced
